auth.signInSubtitle: We'll email you a magic link — no password needed.
auth.checkYourEmailBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to continue.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

orgSignup.title: Set up your organization
orgSignup.subtitle: This becomes the account every conference you run lives under.
orgSignup.slugHelp: Used in links — lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
orgSignup.errorSlugTaken: That slug is already in use — try another.
orgSignup.notForDelegatesNotice: This creates a brand-new organization account — only do this if you're setting up Dais for the first time as a conference organizer. If you were invited as a chair or delegate, you don't need this: use the invite link or join code your organizer sent you instead.

adminDashboard.title: Conferences
adminDashboard.emptyBody: Create your first conference to start building committees, rooms, and a schedule.
adminDashboard.committeeMemberBody: Your account is linked to a committee, but the committee floor isn't open yet. Check back once your conference chairs have started the session.

conferences.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

committees.errorRoomTaken: That room is already assigned to another committee.
committees.confirmDelete: Delete "{name}"? This also removes its roster, invites, and any session data. This can't be undone.

roster.noCommittees: Create a committee first before inviting chairs or delegates.
roster.addInviteHelp: This doesn't send an email — Dais doesn't have email sending set up yet. Tell this person directly to sign in at the site with this exact email address; they'll be added to the committee automatically the first time they do.
roster.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

join.title: Join a committee
join.subtitle: You've been invited using an open join code. Add your delegation if you know it — a chair can also assign it later.
join.successBody: You've been added to the committee. The committee floor isn't open yet — check back once your chairs start the session.
join.errorGeneric: That code isn't valid or has been revoked.
